description: Side-by-side comparison of two CNV test runs (v2) with cascading workload/version selection, environment diff, validation comparison, and Prometheus metric overlay

settings.script: def nsCount = 1; def vmsPerNs = _value; if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].size() > 0) { nsCount = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].value); } if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].size() > 0) { vmsPerNs = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].value); } return nsCount * vmsPerNs;

def nsCount = 1; def vmsPerNs = _value; if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].size() > 0) { nsCount = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].value); } if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].size() > 0) { vmsPerNs = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].value); } return nsCount * vmsPerNs;

targets.query: uuid.keyword: $uuidA AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND quantileName.keyword: $latencyPercentile
uuid.keyword: $uuidB AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND quantileName.keyword: $latencyPercentile

list.label: Metric
list.name: metricToCompare
list.query: nodeCPU : nodeCPU,nodeMemoryAvailable : nodeMemoryAvailable,nodeDiskWrittenBytes : nodeDiskWrittenBytes,nodeDiskReadBytes : nodeDiskReadBytes,kubevirtCPU : kubevirtCPU,kubevirtMemory : kubevirtMemory,kubevirtAPIRequestRate : kubevirtAPIRequestRate,kubevirtWorkQueueDepth : kubevirtWorkQueueDepth,kubevirtWorkQueueAddRate : kubevirtWorkQueueAddRate,APIRequestRate : APIRequestRate,99thEtcdDiskWalFsync : 99thEtcdDiskWalFsync,99thEtcdDiskBackendCommit : 99thEtcdDiskBackendCommit,etcdDBSize : etcdDBSize,nodeNetworkBytesReceived : nodeNetworkBytesReceived,nodeNetworkBytesTransmitted : nodeNetworkBytesTransmitted,containerCPU : containerCPU

title: CNV Run Comparison v2
